name: Burgundy Silk Banarasi Saree
description: Drape yourself in timeless elegance with this exquisite Banarasi silk saree in deep burgundy. Features a stunning gold zari border with intricate floral motifs and a rich pallu. Perfect for weddings, festivities, and grand occasions. Comes with an unstitched blouse piece.

name: Emerald Kanjivaram Silk Saree
description: A masterpiece of South Indian weaving, this pure Kanjivaram silk saree in radiant emerald green features heavy gold zari work throughout. The contrasting gold border and rich pallu make it a prized possession for any woman's wardrobe.

name: Royal Blue Georgette Saree
description: An ethereal georgette saree in royal blue adorned with silver sequin work along the border. Lightweight and easy to drape, it's ideal for parties, cocktail events, and festive gatherings. The flowing fabric ensures you look graceful all day.

name: Ivory Rose Embroidered Kurti
description: A beautifully crafted A-line kurti in ivory featuring delicate rose gold embroidery at the neckline and hem. The soft fabric and flared silhouette ensure all-day comfort without compromising on style. Pair with churidar or palazzo pants.

name: Indigo Block Print Cotton Kurti
description: Crafted from pure cotton with traditional Dabu block printing in indigo blue with white geometric motifs. A straight-cut kurta with 3/4 sleeves, perfect for daily wear and casual outings. Breathable and comfortable for Mangalore's warm weather.

name: Pink Georgette Kurti-Sharara Set
description: A dreamy two-piece set featuring a flared kurti and matching flared sharara pants in soft pink georgette. The embroidered neckline with mirror work adds a festive flair. Perfect for Eid, Navratri, or any celebration.

name: Maroon & Gold Bridal Lehenga
description: A breathtaking bridal lehenga set in deep maroon with heavy gold embroidery, zardozi work, and mirror accents. Includes a heavily embroidered choli and a sheer dupatta. The flared skirt with multiple layers creates a regal silhouette for your special day.

name: Black Floral Wrap Dress
description: A chic and versatile midi wrap dress in deep black with subtle floral prints. The V-neckline and belted waist create a flattering silhouette for all body types. Pairs beautifully with heels or sandals for effortless style.

name: Kundan Gold Jewellery Set
description: An ornate Kundan jewellery set featuring a statement necklace, matching earrings, and two bangles. Crafted with high-quality gold-plated metal and kundan stones. The perfect finishing touch for lehengas, sarees, and festive outfits.

name: Ivory Gold Embroidered Dupatta
description: A luxurious hand-embroidered dupatta in ivory with gold threadwork and mirror accents. The heavy embroidery on the border adds a rich, festive look. Versatile enough to pair with kurtis, lehengas, or suits.
